use_codes.desc: FOR USE IN PATIENTS HAVING SYMPTOMATIC OR PROGRESSIVE MEDULLARY THYROID CANCER, WITH UNRESECTABLE LOCALLY ADVANCED OR METASTATIC DISEASE

indications.text:
CAPRELSA is indicated for the treatment of symptomatic or progressive medullary thyroid
cancer in patients with unresectable locally advanced or metastatic disease.
Use CAPRELSA in patients with indolent, asymptomatic or slowly progressing disease only
after careful consideration of the treatment re...
